id.description: Globally unique identifier of this conformity scheme. Typically represented as a URI SchemeOwner/SchemeName URI

name.description: Name of this scheme as defined by the scheme owner.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of this party. Typically represented as a URI identifierScheme/Identifier URI

name.description: Legal registered name of this party.

registeredId.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the Party within the register. Unique within the register.

owner.description: The party that is the owner / maintainer of this conformity scheme.

endorsement.description: The endorsement provided to the scheme by an external authority such as a regulator, an accreditaiton authority, or a benchmarking scheme.

schemeScoringFramework.description: The scheme level overall scoring framework that represents the achievement levels (AA, A, B etc) that maybe be awarded to the subject of an independent assessment under the scheme.

documentation.description: A web page providing full documentation of this scheme.

licenseType.description: Descriptive name and URL link to the license conditions associated with this scheme.

establishedDate.description: The date when this scheme was first established.

geographicScope.description: The geographic scope of this scheme as a list of ISO-3166 countries, regions, or code=001, name=Worldwide to indicate global coverage.

industryScope.description: A list of UN ISIC code & name indicating the industry scope for this scheme.

trustmark.description: The trust mark or seal used by this conformity scheme.

linkURL.description: The URL of the target resource.

conformsTo.description: The name and URI of the vocabulary standard (eg UNTP CVC) that the machine readable version of this sceme conforms to.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of this context specific conformity profile. Typically represented as a URI SchemeOwner/profileID URI

name.description: Name of this conformity profile as defined by the scheme owner.

includedProfile.description: The list of versioned conformity profiles included in this scheme

description: A formal governance scheme under which an attestation is issued (eg ACRS structural steel certification)

name.example: Accreditation of certifiers.com under the Australian National Greenhouse and Energy Reporting scheme (NGER).

trustmark.description: The trust mark image awarded by the AB to the CAB to indicate accreditation.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of this party. Typically represented as a URI identifierScheme/Identifier URI

name.description: Legal registered name of this party.

registeredId.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the Party within the register. Unique within the register.

issuingAuthority.description: The competent authority that issued the accreditation.

endorsementEvidence.description: The evidence that supports the authority under which the attestation is issued - for an example an accreditation certificate.

Endorsement.description: The authority under which a conformity claim is issued.  For example a national accreditation authority may authorise a test lab to issue test certificates about a product against a standard.

name.description: the display name for this image

description.description: The detailed description / supporting information for this image.

imageData.description: The image data encoded as a base64 string.

mediaType.description:
The media type of this image (eg image/png)

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://mimetype.io/

Image.description: A binary image encoded as base64 text and embedded into the data.  Use this for small images like certification trust marks or regulated labels.  Large impages should be external links.

linkURL.description: The URL of the target resource.

digestMultibase.description: An optional multi-base encoded digest to ensure the content of the link has not changed. See https://www.w3.org/TR/vc-data-integrity/#resource-integrity for more information.

mediaType.description: The media type of the target resource.

linkType.description: The type of the target resource - drawn from a controlled vocabulary

Link.description: A structure to provide a URL link plus metadata associated with the link.

name.description: A name for this scoring framework.  Must be unique within a scheme.

description.description: A full text description of the criterion that clearly specifies how compliance is achieved and measured.

score.description: A list of scores and ranks associated with this scoring framework.

ScoringFramework.description: A scoring framework used for performance level assessments against a criteria or scheme. For example forced labour performance might score A to D depending on the percentage of workforce subject to recruitment fees.

code.description: The coded value for this score (eg "AAA")

rank.description: The ranking of this score within the scoring framework - using an integer where "1" is the highest rank.

definition.description: A description of the meaning of this score.

Score.description: A single score within a scoring framework.

name.description: Name of the classification represented by the code

definition.description: A rich definition of this classification code.

schemeName.description: The name of the classification scheme

Classification.description: A classification scheme and code / name representing a category value for a product, entity, or facility.
